allow_instructions: Read-only commands (ls, cat, grep, git status, git log, git diff) are always fine.
Running the project's own test, lint, typecheck, and build commands is always fine.
Package installs via the project's package manager (npm, pnpm, pip, cargo, go) are fine.
block_instructions: Any git push to a default or shared branch (main, master, dev, pre-dev) must go through approval first.
Any command that deletes files tracked by git, resets git history, or force-pushes must go through approval first.
Any command that uses credentials, API tokens, or secrets must go through approval first.
Any command that modifies data in a database or calls a paid external service must go through approval first.
